_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.3/SWTools-1.1.3-Setup.exe, setup sha256 344bd438ac6cb64c19c3931c66ed0809285e501c0e71ae74ffc2136681f7f681. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
